faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in Bay Ridge?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Bay Ridge, Brooklyn. Our technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess and begin treatment, with most drain fly problems resolved within 1-2 visits depending on the severity of the infestation.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and potential breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic treatments to eliminate larvae and organic buildup, mechanical cleaning when necessary, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete eradication. faqs.question: Why are drain flies so common in Bay Ridge buildings?
faqs.answer: Bay Ridge's combination of older plumbing systems in pre-war buildings and high humidity from its waterfront location creates ideal conditions for drain flies. Organic matter buildup in aging pipes, combined with moisture from bathrooms and kitchens, provides perfect breeding grounds. Our treatments address both the flies and the underlying conditions causing the problem.

faqs.question: Are your drain fly treatments safe for my Bay Ridge home or restaurant?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved, eco-friendly bio-enzymatic treatments that are safe for homes, restaurants, and commercial kitchens. Our methods effectively eliminate drain flies and their larvae without harsh chemicals, making them safe for children, pets, and food preparation areas while complying with NYC health regulations.
